---
title: "Calendar"
---

Upcoming events as of `r format(Sys.Date(), "%B, %Y")`:

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(TeachingDemos)

setday <-cal(6,2026)                             ## June
setday(3)
rect(-0.04,-0.04,1.04,1.04, col="#ed8ade")
text(0.5,0.5,"Phantazee\nDrapht")
setday(10)
rect(-0.04,-0.04,1.04,1.04, col="#8aeaed")
text(0.5,0.5,"Practice \n 6:30")

setday <-cal(7,2026)                             ## July
setday(25)
rect(-0.04,-0.04,1.04,1.04, col="#8aed95")
text(0.5,0.5,"Rock 'n Roll!!")

## https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/TeachingDemos/versions/2.10/topics/cal
```
